note: Stub catalog. Run notebooks/model_picker_lab.py with OPENROUTER_API_KEY set to replace with the live OpenRouter catalog.

chunks.name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
chunks.tagline: Strong general-purpose chat with vision and tool use
chunks.description: Anthropic's mid-tier model. Frequently cited for code, writing, and tool use. Vision-capable.

chunks.name: GPT-4o mini
chunks.description: OpenAI's small multimodal model. Strong cost-to-capability ratio for everyday tasks.

chunks.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
chunks.tagline: Fast multimodal model with a million-token context
chunks.description: Google's frontier-flash model. Vision, audio, and a 1M context window at sub-cent token prices.

chunks.name: DeepSeek V3
chunks.description: DeepSeek's flagship chat model. Open weights, competitive on code and reasoning tasks.

chunks.name: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
chunks.tagline: Open-weight 70B with broad capability and tool support
chunks.description: Meta's instruction-tuned 70B model. Solid general-purpose open-weight option.

chunks.name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B
chunks.description: Alibaba's code-specialized 32B model. Strong coding benchmarks at a fraction of frontier prices.

chunks.name: o1-mini
chunks.tagline: Reasoning-tuned model for math and code problems
chunks.description: OpenAI's compact reasoning model. Slower but stronger on multi-step problems.

chunks.name: Claude 3 Haiku
chunks.description: Anthropic's small fast model. Useful when latency matters and the task is simple.

chunks.name: Mistral Large
chunks.description: Mistral AI's flagship hosted model with native function calling.

chunks.name: Grok 2
chunks.tagline: xAI's flagship general-purpose model with vision
chunks.description: xAI's general-purpose model with vision input.

chunks.name: DeepSeek R1
chunks.description: DeepSeek's R1 reasoning-tuned model. Open weights, comparable to o1-mini on math benchmarks per the model card.

chunks.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite
chunks.description: Google's smallest Flash variant. Lower price, same context window.
